name: Trivy
description: Comprehensive security scanner for containers, filesystems, git repos, and IaC
when_to_use: Scan Docker images before deploy, scan repos for vulnerabilities and misconfigs
what_it_finds: CVEs in OS packages and language deps, IaC misconfigs, exposed secrets, license issues

name: Semgrep
description: Static analysis tool finding bugs and security issues using pattern-matching rules
when_to_use: Code review, CI pipelines, security audits — supports custom rules
what_it_finds: SQL injection, XSS, insecure deserialization, hardcoded secrets, OWASP Top 10

name: Gitleaks
description: Scan git repos for hardcoded secrets like API keys, passwords, and tokens
when_to_use: Before commits (pre-commit hook), in CI, auditing existing repos
what_it_finds: API keys, passwords, tokens, private keys, cloud credentials in source code and git history

install.command: brew install gitleaks || go install github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks/v8@latest

name: Snyk CLI
description: Find and fix vulnerabilities in dependencies, containers, and IaC
when_to_use: Dependency scanning in CI, container security, IaC review
what_it_finds: Vulnerable dependencies, container vulnerabilities, IaC misconfigurations
